name: io.github.bepunk/zoogent
description: Lightweight AI agent orchestrator with built-in Architect AI. Multi-team support, web dashboard, 35+ MCP tools.

environmentVariables.description: URL of the ZooGent server (for remote connections)
environmentVariables.name: ZOOGENT_URL

environmentVariables.description: API key for authenticating with the ZooGent server (generate in Settings UI)
environmentVariables.name: ZOOGENT_API_KEY
